summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Knowles Recruitment website. All core functionality working perfectly including contact forms, navigation, responsive design, and backend API integration.
passed_tests: Contact form submission for all form types (search-brief, hire-talent, start-search, candidate-inquiry, final-cta)
Form validation (rejects missing required fields with 422 status)
All CTA buttons opening correct modals
Form validation with required field messages
Premium design elements (red #DC2626 brand, spacing, typography)
